mappings.rationaleAI: Metabolism and bioenergetics are fundamental processes sustaining life.
Photosynthesis in plants is the primary bioenergetic process converting solar energy into chemical energy through biosynthesis.
Metabolic energy through ATP synthesis and bioenergetics powers all biosynthetic processes in living organisms.
Thermodynamic principles govern bioenergetics and metabolic energy transformations in living systems.
Algal photosynthesis is a major pathway in bioenergetics and biosynthesis.
Metabolism encompasses bioenergetics and biosynthesis as treated in this section.
Photosynthesis is the primary bioenergetic process converting light energy to chemical energy.
Carbohydrate metabolism is central to bioenergetics and biosynthesis in living organisms.
Lipid metabolism is a major pathway in bioenergetics and biosynthesis.
Redox reactions power cellular metabolism through bioenergetic electron-transport chains.
